creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
Gem for the msgpack 1.4.1 was removed from rubygems.org
So the build is failing with the following message:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--  Phase: fetch
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
===>  License APACHE20 accepted by the user
=> msgpack-1.4.1.gem doesn't seem to exist in /distfiles/rubygem.
=> Attempting to fetch https://rubygems.org/downloads/msgpack-1.4.1.gem
fetch: https://rubygems.org/downloads/msgpack-1.4.1.gem: Forbidden
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/rubygem/msgpack-1.4.1.gem
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/rubygem/msgpack-1.4.1.gem: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /distfiles/rubygem and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /xports/devel/rubygem-msgpack

--------
There is a newer version of the msgpack was released recently 1.4.2, and the port should use it instead.
